title: Launcher UI
description: Dark themed GUI that resembles the Minecraft Launcher
body:
This is a Minecraft Resource Pack that strives to re-create the style of the Minecraft Launcher to the GUI inside the game. The colours are mainly dark-gray with the iconic green from the launcher. Just look at the preview images and check it out if you like the way it looks, cheers 🫶

![launcher-ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1b0afecb6c6d006b450f0805c830184c923aada.png)

**The pack needs either [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) for special containers GUI to work.**


<details>
<summary>Special Containers</summary>

[OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) also works for Fabric installations

![Ender_chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/n6CarXeN/images/24ae3bb97505fa9af145d23313832d331ba0e59d.png)

</details>



I've created other Resource Packs for Minecraft which you can check out on [CurseForge🔥](https://www.curseforge.com/members/ecorn/projects) or [Planet Minecraft🌍](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/ecorn/submissions/?morder=order_latest)


I also have a Discord server, which is the best place to provide feedback!


![Discord](https://i.postimg.cc/JhtpyZrS/discord.png)
